name: Hold My Hand at Twilight
overview: Having spent her entire life in the remote Japanese countryside, Asagi Soramame takes a giant leap of faith when she decides to follow her childhood friend and fiancé to Tokyo. But life in the big city quickly proves to be nothing as she imagined. Struggling to find her place in this big new world, Asagi’s life takes an interesting detour when she meets an aspiring musician, Oto Umino.

trailers.title: 広瀬すず×永瀬廉　夢追う2人の青春ラブストーリー　火曜ドラマ『夕暮れに､手をつなぐ』1月17日スタート【過去回はパラビで配信中】
